rulings.Case Title: JAMES BARAGAR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 13, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Gibbs & Cox, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment was continued from August 31 to give plaintiffs an opportunity to file supplemental opposition papers, which they have now done. By 4:30pm today defendant should send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating whether it wishes to file supplemental reply papers and, if so, how long it needs to file those papers. If defendant states that it intends to file supplemental reply papers, the court will vacate the hearing on Monday September 13 and set a new hearing on the motion. If the new hearing date is after the currently set trial date of September 27, the court will entertain and likely grant a motion to continue the trial date. If the new hearing date is on or before September 27 and the motion is denied in whole or in part, the court will entertain and likely grant a motion to continue the trial date. If defendant states that it does not intend to file supplemental reply papers, the hearing on Monday September 13 will go forward as scheduled at 9:30am. =(220/HEK)
